## What I tried to do

## What happened
<!-- The actual behaviour. Add screenshots / a screen recording if useful. -->

## Expected
<!-- What you thought should happen. -->

## Repro steps
1.
2.

## Environment
- Page / URL:
- Locale: English / हिंदी
- Device: Desktop / Mobile (Android / iOS)
- Browser:
- Network: Online / Offline / Throttled

## Severity
- [ ] **Blocker** — breaks a core flow (visit plan won't load, can't log outcome, app crashes)
- [ ] **High** — frequent path, visible polish issue, or broken in one locale only
- [ ] **Medium** — edge case, minor UI glitch
- [ ] **Low** — copy nit, spacing, naming suggestion
